name_en: SAINT LAURENT Caviar Envelope Bag with V-shaped quilting. It continues the classic envelope silhouette but possesses the soul of an envelope, instantly boosting its practicality! Made from Italian original cowhide with exquisite craftsmanship, the exclusive custom metal YSL logo highlights individuality. The flap design ensures security. A small bag with large capacity, featuring 18 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket.Model: 620280Dimensions: 22.5x14x4cm
